definition_population.content: Psoriasis is a chronic immune-mediated inflammatory skin disease with scaly erythematous plaques, driven by the IL-23/Th17/IL-17 axis; affects all ages/both sexes with bimodal onset.

epidemiology.content: Global systematic modelling study estimated psoriasis incidence and prevalence across countries/regions using multiple international databases.

sources.quote: To systematically review and provide information on the incidence of psoriasis and quantify global, regional, and country specific estimates of its prevalence

biology.content: KLHDC10 has no direct PubMed literature link to psoriasis — not established in this pass. Central pathogenic mechanism is IL-23/Th17/IL-17 axis dysregulation, directly implicating CD4+ Th17 cells; a 2026 study profiled Th17 effector activity during IL-17A-targeted biologic treatment.

sources.quote: Plaque psoriasis (PP) is a chronic immune-mediated inflammatory disease driven by dysregulation of the IL-23/Th17/IL-17 axis

treatment.content: Secukinumab (COSENTYX), anti-IL-17A monoclonal antibody, FDA-approved for psoriasis (BLA125504, original approval 2015-01-21); follow-on BLA761349 approved 2023-10-06.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP drug-regulatory record: application_number=BLA125504, sponsor=NOVARTIS PHARMS CORP)
sources.quote: BLA125504, sponsor NOVARTIS PHARMS CORP, original approval action 2015-01-21

regulatory_trials.content: ClinicalTrials.gov lists 1,894 total interventional trials registered under 'psoriasis'.

sources.source_url: (no URL returned by tool; MCP clinical-trials search_trials result, condition="psoriasis", total=1894)

gaps: KLHDC10-psoriasis mechanistic link not established in this pass despite OT genetic-association score of 0.4.
General IL-23/Th17/IL-17 pathway biology is well supported, but the specific platform target gene itself lacks direct literature validation.
